meta.decision_rationale: Community co-creation operationalizes governance promises. Specific mechanisms, roles, and decision-making processes that transform Phase 4 narrative into lived practice.
evidence_refs: Governance model examples from other libraries
Community input on preferred participation methods
tradeoffs: Formal co-creation mechanisms take time and resources
Without them, narrative commitments remain aspirational
rejected_alternatives: Narrative without mechanisms (theater, not real governance)
Mechanisms without narrative (people don't understand why)

composition.selection: Elected annually by community vote (24-month term possible)
composition.responsibility: Represent patron interests; vote on major collection and budget decisions
Represent staff expertise and operational constraints

composition.selection: Hired by Council; reports to Council
composition.responsibility: Execute Council decisions; manage day-to-day operations

decision_types.authority: Community vote (advisory); Council decides with community input

decision_types.timeline: Annual performance review; 60 days for change process

participation_mechanisms.purpose: Structured input on policies, collection, budget
Strategic direction-setting; open discussion of vision
Deep input on collections (youth, seniors, multilingual, etc.)

accountability_mechanisms: Annual public report on governance decisions
